title: Dasistepha caespitosa
taxonomy: Dasistepha caespitosa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae, commonly known as grasses. It belongs to the tribe Oryzeae and is native to tropical Africa. The genus Dasistepha is also part of the Poaceae family, which includes many types of grasses. Dasistepha caespitosa is closely related to other species within the tribe Oryzeae, such as Oryza and Leersia. Further taxonomic classification of Dasistepha caespitosa may be available through more specific scientific studies.
